design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Control a cyborg law enforcement agent in combat against killer robots across urban and industrial environments

world_building_techniques: IP-driven setting (RoboCop and Terminator franchises combined)

environmental_storytelling: Urban and industrial settings reflecting 1990s action cinema

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - RoboCop Versus The Terminator (SNES)
data_quality_notes: T3 tier: Only metadata and developer credits available. Core gameplay mechanics, difficulty design, progression systems, and boss design patterns are not documented in available source. Complete design extraction requires gameplay documentation, manual testing, or developer interviews.
